Citation collection covers 128 claims, 196 citation bindings and 111 sources. Exact-hash screenshot observations, field-level JSON Pointers and jointly supported ordered source cards fail closed on missing reviews or invalid position topology.

The restricted sandbox initially refused the local browser bind; the approved local-only rerun passed. Semantic dependencies were installed from the repository lockfile; neither fallback made an official-source or external paid-model request.
